## What & why

<!-- New app? Token fix? Sharper spec? One or two lines on what changed and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Values verified against the **latest live build** (not marketing/store shots)
- [ ] **Light and dark** appearances both documented
- [ ] Token changes mirrored across `DESIGN.md` + `DESIGN-swiftui.md` / `DESIGN-expo.md` / `DESIGN-android.md`
- [ ] Platform-correct (44pt targets, Dynamic Type / `sp`, safe areas, real motion/haptics)
- [ ] The app keeps its **own identity** — no tokens copied from another pack

## Evidence

<!-- Before/after screenshots, a sampled pixel, or a link to public brand docs. Optional but speeds review. -->
